signals.headline: Kremlin Welcomes US-Iran-Israel Ceasefire, Hopes for US-Ukraine Talks Resumption | NO | HIGH confidence**
signals.raw:

signals.headline: Based on the search results provided, here are the key breaking developments from April 2026:
signals.raw: Based on the search results provided, here are the key breaking developments from April 2026:

signals.headline: Solana Hits 167M Monthly Token Holders Record | YES | HIGH confidence**
signals.raw:
Solana Hits 167M Monthly Token Holders Record | YES | HIGH confidence**
Solana reached an all-time record of 167 million monthly token holders as of April 14, 2026, with daily non-vote transactions hitting historic highs of 148 million[2]. The Alpenglow consensus upgrade aims to reduce transaction finality from 12 seconds to 150 milliseconds[2].
matched_markets: Solana Up or Down - April 17, 4:40AM-4:45AM ET

signals.headline: Major Institutional Access Expansion for Solana | YES | HIGH confidence**
signals.raw:
Major Institutional Access Expansion for Solana | YES | HIGH confidence**
Interactive Brokers launched SOL trading for European investors through Zero Hash, giving one of the world's largest brokerage platforms direct access to Solana[5]. BlackRock and Fidelity disclosed record SOL ETF holdings[2].

signals.headline: XRP Receives Significant ETP Inflows | YES | HIGH confidence**
signals.raw:
XRP Receives Significant ETP Inflows | YES | HIGH confidence**
XRP attracted $120 million in global ETP inflows (the most of any crypto asset), with Switzerland directing 70% of all global flows at $157 million into Swiss-listed products[5]. XRP spot ETFs reached approximately $1 billion in combined assets under management[5].

signals.headline: CLARITY Act Advances Toward Senate Vote | YES | MED confidence**
signals.raw:
CLARITY Act Advances Toward Senate Vote | YES | MED confidence**
The CLARITY Act heads toward a Senate Banking Committee markup vote expected in late April 2026, with Coinbase CEO Brian Armstrong publicly endorsing the bill on April 9[5].

signals.headline: Drift Protocol $280M Hack on Solana | YES | HIGH confidence**
signals.raw:
Drift Protocol $280M Hack on Solana | YES | HIGH confidence**
A Solana-based DeFi platform Drift Protocol was hacked on April 1, with attackers withdrawing at least $280 million through sophisticated social engineering targeting multisig signatories[6].
matched_markets: Solana Up or Down - April 17, 4:40AM-4:45AM ET
